subject: DG Implementation - RAN Slice RPCS
commit_message:

Patch Set 8:

The one problem I have with this review is it is late.  It was submitted on the date of M3 - when dockers were already supposed to have been created and submitted to OOM for review. 

We can merge this (since DG changes are by design relatively isolated and unlikely to break other code), but it will not be included in the initial M3 release - since those containers are already created.  It will be delivered to OOM between RC0 and RC1.

Patch Set 8: Code-Review-1

Please address Kapil's comment.  Please also be aware, RC0 is this Thursday ... this needs to be finished soon.  After RC0, only high severity bug fixes are allowed - no more features.
